text: Configure UART2 on STM32F4 at 115200 baud with DMA reception.
Write a FreeRTOS task that reads an I2C sensor (BME280) every 2 seconds and sends data to a queue.
Write ARM Thumb-2 assembly for a fast memcpy with 32-bit aligned transfers on Cortex-M4.
How to configure the ADC on STM32F4 with DMA for continuous multi-channel scanning?
Implement a hardware timer interrupt on STM32F4 that toggles an LED at exactly 1kHz.
Write a SPI driver for STM32 to communicate with a W25Q128 flash memory. Include read, write, and erase functions.
How do I set up the STM32 MPU (Memory Protection Unit) to protect a critical memory region?
Implement a CAN bus driver for STM32F4 to send and receive messages.
Write a low-power sleep mode implementation for STM32L4 with RTC wakeup.
Explain the STM32 clock tree and write the SystemClock_Config for 168MHz on STM32F407.
How to use the STM32 hardware CRC peripheral for data integrity verification?
Write a bootloader concept for STM32 that jumps to the application after CRC check.
